headline: Netflix cuts several dozen from global product team, Variety reports
summary: Netflix (NFLX) has cut several dozen staff from its global product team as part of an internal re-organization, Variety’s Alex Ritman reports. The cuts were made to the creative studio unit, a team of designers and producers who create marketing such as posters, in-app trailers and content for live-experiences across content, product and marketing, Ritman writes.Claim 70% Off TipRanks PremiumUnlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions Stay ahead of th

headline: Netflix to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) today announced it will post its first quarter 2026 financial results and business outlook on its investor relations website at http://ir.netflix.net on Thursday April 16th, 2026, at approximately 1:01 p.m. Pacific Time.

headline: Netflix Reorganization Puts Product And Creative Efficiency In Investor Focus
summary: Netflix, ticker NasdaqGS:NFLX, is reorganizing its global product team and creative studio unit. The company is reducing headcount within these groups as part of an internal streamlining effort. This move comes during a period of strong financial performance for Netflix. The changes affect how Netflix structures work on its product experience and creative assets worldwide. Netflix, NasdaqGS:NFLX, runs a global subscription video streaming platform that competes with traditional TV, film...

headline: Amazon to hike price of ad-free Prime Video tier by $2 a month
summary: Amazon is boosting the price of Prime Video to $4.99 a month in the U.S., from $2.99 per month for users who want to avoid ads.

headline: Netflix, Target, Transocean And A Financial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: On Thursday, Netflix shares fell 0.6% to $94.31 and Target declined 2.6% to $115.75, but CME Group gained 2.6% to close at $311.19.
